message:
fix(runtime): Handle ArrayList(PyValue) vs [N]string comparison in pyAnyEql

When comparing op_sequence results (ArrayList of PyValue containing
strings) against expected values (fixed arrays of string literals),
pyAnyEql now properly extracts the .string field from each PyValue
for comparison instead of returning false due to type mismatch.

This enables tests like assertEqual(op_sequence(...), ['A.__eq__', ...])
to work correctly when the result contains PyValue-wrapped strings.
